instruction: Summarize the latest queue and dashboard rendering decisions from canonical repo state.
input: The orchestrator queue ordering and dashboard operational styling decisions made after the core goals were committed.
output: Child-repo work stays in the queue but only after the orchestrator GUI is fully built out. The orchestrator should not manage new repos from an unfinished control plane. Operational dashboard modules should render green at the container level when their repo-backed function is live, while unfinished DAG task rows stay individually red or yellow.
